# YVid — LLMs.txt
> https://yvid.pages.dev

YVid is an open-source video and audio downloader with a sleek GUI and a powerful CLI. It downloads videos, audio, and playlists from multiple platforms with blazing speed and a clean modular codebase.

## Key Info

- **Project:** YVid
- **Version:** v2.0.0
- **License:** MIT
- **Repository:** https://github.com/zaidejjo/yvid
- **Install:** https://yvid.pages.dev/#install
- **Website:** https://yvid.pages.dev

## Quick Install

### One-command install (auto-detect OS):
```sh
curl -fsSL https://yvid.pages.dev/install.sh | sh
```

### Package managers:
```
# Arch Linux (AUR)
yay -S yvid-git

# UV (Python)
uv tool install yvid

# PIP (Standard)
pip install yvid
```

## Architecture

- **core/**: Download logic, format negotiation, playlist parsing
- **cli/**: Rich terminal interface (click + rich)
- **GUI/**: Desktop interface (Dear PyGui)
- **thread/**: Concurrent download engine with queue management

## Platforms

- macOS (Intel & Apple Silicon)
- Linux (deb/rpm/arch)
- Windows (exe/msi)

## Key Features

- Low memory footprint (~42 MB for 4K downloads)
- Stream-based downloading (no full-file RAM loading)
- Pause/resume/cancel individual downloads
- Concurrent download queue
- System tray integration (GUI)
- 98% test coverage
- 12 core modules

## Tech Stack

- GUI: Dear PyGui
- CLI: rich + click
- Runtime: Python 3.10+
- Landing page: Astro + Tailwind CSS
